params.prompt: Create a premium 4:5 Instagram PROGRAM GRAPHIC for Limitless Club with stronger Thai-first selling message. Dark Midnight Luxe Editorial style: black/charcoal/graphite, silver-white typography, electric blue accents, premium course poster. Required layout text: LIMITLESS CLUB top; HERMES AGENT title; Multi-Agent AI Masterclass subtitle; large Thai hero line: คอร์สที่จะเปลี่ยน AI ให้เป็น “ทีมงาน” ของคุณ; quote card: Build the team that never sleeps.; three agent chips: Chief of Staff Agent, Content Agent, Vibe Coding Agent; bottom CTA: สร้างทีม AI Agent ที่ทำงาน 24/7; footer: By Jedi Trinupab · @jeditrinupab. Visual: elegant AI agent command interface, subtle holographic assistant, clean mobile-readable hierarchy, no extra logos, no clutter, no duplicate text, no spelling errors.
